IDiaDecryptionService

using System.IO;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts
{
    public interface IDiaDecryptionService
    {
        Task DecryptAsync(
            byte[] fileBytes,
            MemoryStream outputStream,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);
    }
}

DiaDecryptionService
using System.IO;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Contracts;

namespace WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.Services.Services
{
    public class DiaDecryptionService : IDiaDecryptionService
    {
        public Task DecryptAsync(
            byte[] fileBytes,
            MemoryStream outputStream,
            CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
        {
            return GNUServices.DecryptAsync(fileBytes, outputStream);
        }
    }
}
